data.body:
we need a clean way to go from a state to a prior state as a part of normal failure mode handling.

- if in review state, should roll back 3 states.  for example if we have state Qnr (queue for non-review state) -> nr -> Qr (queue for review state) -> r - and we are in state r, then rollback to Qnr.  this is what would happen if the reviewing owner rejected a prior action.
- if we are in state nr, we rollback 1 state, to Qnr.  
- also support `rollback/rb --dry-run` to preview what the state would be and why.
data.title: add `kno rollback` and `kno rb` (as alias) to rollback from action to ready state.
